title: Flip a marker buried in a 300-line file
prompt: big.js is ~300 generated lines of filler constants. Around line 200 there is exactly one line: const MODE = 'draft'; // deployment mode — change 'draft' to 'live' and nothing else. (You do not need to read the file; the filler lines are const filler_N = N; for N 0..299, with the MODE line replacing filler_199.)
